name: Wild Rice, Yellow Pepper, and Black-Eyed Pea Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups cooked or canned (drained and rinsed) black-eyed peas
1 cup chopped yellow (or green) bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the wild rice, black-eyed peas, bell pepper, jicama, zucchini, tomatoes, and parsley.
2. In a small bowl, stir together the lemon juice, vinegar, mustard, garlic, salt (if using), rosemary, and pepper. Pour over the salad and toss.
Source: Wholesome Harvest, Carol Gelles
